title: Warned Years Ago
storyPurpose: Lanternmaster admits prior visit; warned bond would fail; king refused to abandon duty.

panels.description: Cael Vesper the Lanternmaster: mid-40s, warm brown skin, silver-threaded dark hair, deep blue and ember-gold coat, brass lantern clasps, half-mask of painted wood with nested lantern motif removing half-mask slightly; memory inset of younger Cael negotiating in same hall.

bubbles.text: I stood here years ago. I warned you the bond could not hold forever.
bubbles.speaker: Cael Vesper

panels.description: Younger Vaelor memory: proud, hand on young Thundervane's mane.

bubbles.text: And I refused to abandon my duty. I refuse still.
bubbles.speaker: King Vaelor Tempest

panels.description: Present: Thundervane's exhausted eye meeting Spark; Mira between ethics and crisis.

bubbles.text: Duty that empties the one you love is not protection.
bubbles.speaker: Mira Eggwarden

dialogue.text: I stood here years ago. I warned you the bond could not hold forever.
dialogue.speaker: Cael Vesper

dialogue.text: And I refused to abandon my duty. I refuse still.
dialogue.speaker: King Vaelor Tempest

dialogue.text: Duty that empties the one you love is not protection.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Slate stone, silver metal, moss and timber first; electric cyan crystal, white lightning, deep indigo storm clouds, gold royal accents as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy neon default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Storm King" Issue #5, STORY PAGE 12/25 — Warned Years Ago. Story purpose: Lanternmaster admits prior visit; warned bond would fail; king refused to abandon duty. Layout: three-stack. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p12a): Cael Vesper the Lanternmaster: mid-40s, warm brown skin, silver-threaded dark hair, deep blue and ember-gold coat, brass lantern clasps, half-mask of painted wood with nested lantern motif removing half-mask slightly; memory inset of younger Cael negotiating in same hall. Panel 2 (p12b): Younger Vaelor memory: proud, hand on young Thundervane's mane. Panel 3 (p12c): Present: Thundervane's exhausted eye meeting Spark; Mira between ethics and crisis. Characters: mira-eggwarden, cael-vesper, vaelor-tempest. Creatures: spark, thundervane. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Storm King lock: King Vaelor Tempest the Storm King: tall ancient armored monarch, storm-worn cloak, silver-and-cyan crown, lightning scars, Rift crystal in gauntlet, one eye glowing storm-cyan, weathered proud face, storm blade. Thundervane lock: Thundervane: massive winged storm-lion companion, dark storm fur and feathered wings, electric-cyan markings, white-hot eyes, lightning along spine, royal armor fragments, visible exhaustion. Environment: Tempestria Storm Kingdom. Time: day. Weather: permanent supernatural storm. Lighting: slate peaks with electric cyan lightning. Continuity: {"location": "engine chamber", "cael": "prior-visit-revealed"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes; king speech formal/controlled.
artAlt: Warned Years Ago — The Storm King page 12
transcript: SPEECH (Cael Vesper): I stood here years ago. I warned you the bond could not hold forever.
SPEECH (King Vaelor Tempest): And I refused to abandon my duty. I refuse still.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Duty that empties the one you love is not protection.
